revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data Kingdom of Scotland]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data Kingdom of Scotland]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Replacing Flag_of_Scotland_(1542–2003).svg with [[File:Flag_of_Scotland_(1542–2003,_sky_blue).svg]] (by [[commons:User:CommonsDelinker|CommonsDelinker]] because: [[:c:COM:FR|File renamed]]: [[:c:COM:FR#FR3|Criterion 3]] (obvious error)).
1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Kingdom of Scotland | shortname alias = Scotland | flag alias = Flag of Scotland.svg | flag alias-old = Royal Banner of Scotland.svg | flag alias-1542 = Flag of Scotland (1542–2003, sky blue).svg | flag alias-naval = Scottish Red Ensign.svg | link alias-naval = Royal Scots Navy | flag alias-navy = Scottish Red Ensign.svg | link alias-navy = Royal Scots Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = old | var2 = 1542 | related1 = Scotland | cat = Scotland kingdom </noinclude> }} [[Category:New]]

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Kingdom of Scotland | shortname alias = Scotland | flag alias = Flag of Scotland.svg | flag alias-old = Royal Banner of Scotland.svg | flag alias-1542 = Flag of Scotland (1542–2003, sky blue).svg | flag alias-naval = Scottish Red Ensign.svg | link alias-naval = Royal Scots Navy | flag alias-navy = Scottish Red Ensign.svg | link alias-navy = Royal Scots Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = old | var2 = 1542 | related1 = Scotland | cat = Scotland kingdom </noinclude> }} <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Kingdom of Scotland | shortname alias = Scotland | flag alias = Flag of Scotland.svg | flag alias-old = Royal Banner of Scotland.svg | flag alias-1542 = Flag of Scotland (1542–2003, sky blue).svg | flag alias-naval = Scottish Red Ensign.svg | link alias-naval = Royal Scots Navy | flag alias-navy = Scottish Red Ensign.svg | link alias-navy = Royal Scots Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = old | var2 = 1542 | related1 = Scotland | cat = Scotland kingdom </noinclude> }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23359502324|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Kingdom of Scotland | shortname alias = Scotland | flag alias = Flag of Scotland.svg | flag alias-old = Royal Banner of Scotland.svg | flag alias-1542 = Flag of Scotland (1542–2003, sky blue).svg | flag alias-naval = Scottish Red Ensign.svg | link alias-naval = Royal Scots Navy | flag alias-navy = Scottish Red Ensign.svg | link alias-navy = Royal Scots Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = old | var2 = 1542 | related1 = Scotland | cat = Scotland kingdom </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Kingdom_of_Scotland here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Kingdom_of_Scotland for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Kingdom of Scotland | shortname alias = Scotland | flag alias = Flag of Scotland.svg | flag alias-old = Royal Banner of Scotland.svg | flag alias-1542 = Flag of Scotland (1542–2003, sky blue).svg | flag alias-naval = Scottish Red Ensign.svg | link alias-naval = Royal Scots Navy | flag alias-navy = Scottish Red Ensign.svg | link alias-navy = Royal Scots Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = old | var2 = 1542 | related1 = Scotland | cat = Scotland kingdom </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
